name: Maharaghi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>磨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ハ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>羅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ラ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ギ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card cannot be Special Summoned. This card returns to the owner's hand during the End Phase of the turn that this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up. If this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up, look at 1 card on the top of your Deck during your next Draw Phase (before you draw), and return the card to the top or the bottom of your Deck.
flavor: This card cannot be Special Summoned. This card returns to the owner's hand during the End Phase of the turn that this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up. If this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up, look at 1 card on the top of your Deck during your next Draw Phase (before you draw), and return the card to the top or the bottom of your Deck.

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Returns itself from field to hand
Looks at cards from the top of the player's Deck
Places cards from the player's Deck on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the player's Deck on the bottom of the Deck
